characters.name: 矿工
characters.description: 稳定的生命值和补给，适合熟悉矿井规则。
characters.descriptionEn: Reliable health and supplies, ideal for learning the mine.

characters.name: 勘探员
characters.description: 生命较低，但携带更多探测灯，适合谨慎推理。
characters.descriptionEn: Lower health, more probe lamps, and better suited for careful deduction.
